# awscc_cognito_user_pool_regional_configuration_attachment (Resource)

Resource Type definition for AWS::Cognito::UserPoolRegionalConfigurationAttachment



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_pool_id` (String)

### Optional

- `email_configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_configuration))
- `lambda_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--lambda_config))
- `sms_configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sms_configuration))
- `status` (String) The status of the replica. Set to ACTIVE or INACTIVE.
- `user_pool_tags` (Map of String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_cognito_user_pool_regional_configuration_attachment.example
  identity = {
    user_pool_id = "user_pool_id"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `user_pool_id` (String)

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_cognito_user_pool_regional_configuration_attachment.example
  id = "user_pool_id"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_cognito_user_pool_regional_configuration_attachment.example "user_pool_id"
```
